name: What evidence do I need for workplace noise hearing claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for workplace noise hearing claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Audiograms, noise level docs, protection records, witness statements, medical opinions.[1][2] Context: Builds direct job link and negligence.[1] Key factors: OSHA violations, pre/post tests, coworker issues.[2] Practical guidance: Request employer records, test ASAP, file with all; lawyer organizes.[7] Comprehensive proof essential.
